findings.short_text: 14 of 21 simulated objects have category-shift probability at or below 20%.
findings.technical_basis: Category-shift probability is read from score Monte Carlo results.
findings.title: Most simulated top objects retain their priority band

findings.short_text: The highest shift-probability objects should be inspected before treating their category as stable.
findings.title: Some objects show score sensitivity near category thresholds

findings.short_text: Current score simulations do not produce critical-priority p95 values in the saved batch.
findings.technical_basis: The finding checks p95_score in saved score Monte Carlo output.
findings.title: Highest simulated p95 scores remain below critical levels
